name: Spinach
description: Spinach is a leafy green vegetable known for its high nutritional value and versatility in cooking.
variety_info: Common varieties include Savoy, Flat-leaf, and Semi-savoy.

name: Kale
description: Kale is a nutrient-rich leafy green vegetable that can be eaten raw or cooked.
variety_info: Includes Curly, Lacinato, and Red Russian varieties.

name: Broccoli
description: Broccoli is a green vegetable that belongs to the cabbage family and is known for its health benefits.
variety_info: Common varieties include Calabrese and Sprouting.

name: Cauliflower
description: Cauliflower is a cruciferous vegetable that is known for its white head and versatility in dishes.
variety_info: Popular varieties include Snowball and Purple of Sicily.

name: Carrot
description: Carrots are root vegetables known for their sweet flavor and bright orange color.

name: Onion
description: Onions are bulbous vegetables known for their strong flavor and aroma.
variety_info: Includes Yellow, Red, and White onions.

name: Garlic
description: Garlic is a bulbous plant used for its strong flavor and medicinal properties.

name: Sweet Potato
description: Sweet potatoes are starchy root vegetables that are sweet in flavor and high in nutrients.

name: Cucumber
description: Cucumbers are refreshing vegetables that are commonly used in salads and pickles.
variety_info: Includes Slicing, Pickling, and Seedless varieties.

name: Green Beans
description: Green beans are tender, edible pods that can be eaten fresh or cooked.

name: Peas
description: Peas are nutritious and sweet-tasting legumes that grow in pods.
variety_info: Includes varieties like Green Arrow, Sugar Snap, and Snow Peas.

name: Radish
description: Radishes are quick-growing root vegetables with a peppery flavor.
variety_info: Includes Cherry Belle, French Breakfast, and Black Spanish.

name: Beetroot
description: Beetroots are root vegetables known for their deep purple color and sweetness.
variety_info: Includes Detroit Dark Red, Chioggia, and Golden.

name: Eggplant
description: Eggplants are versatile fruits used in various cuisines, known for their glossy skin.
variety_info: Includes Black Beauty, Italian, and Japanese.

name: Celery
description: Celery is a crunchy and nutritious vegetable often used in salads and soups.
variety_info: Includes Golden Self-Blanching, Utah, and Pascal.

name: Okra
description: Okra is a warm-season vegetable known for its edible green pods.

name: Turnip
description: Turnips are root vegetables that can be eaten raw or cooked, known for their mild flavor.
variety_info: Includes Purple Top, Hakurei, and White Globe.

name: Cabbage
description: Cabbage is a leafy green vegetable that is often used in salads and cooking.
variety_info: Includes Green, Red, and Savoy cabbages.

name: Apple
description: Apple trees produce sweet, crisp fruits that are popular worldwide.
variety_info: Includes Fuji, Gala, and Granny Smith.

name: Crabapple
description: Crabapple trees produce small, tart fruits and beautiful spring blossoms.
variety_info: Includes Dolgo, Centennial, and Indian Magic.

name: Pear
description: A deciduous tree that produces sweet, juicy pears.
variety_info: Common varieties include Bartlett, Bosc, and Anjou.
attributes: Produces fruit in late summer to early fall.

name: Peach
description: A small to medium-sized tree known for its juicy, sweet fruits.
attributes: Flowers in spring, fruits in summer.

name: Plum
description: A deciduous tree that produces sweet, tart plums.
variety_info: Popular varieties include Santa Rosa and Satsuma.
attributes: Blooms in spring, fruits in summer.

name: Apricot
description: A small tree that produces sweet, orange fruits.
attributes: Flowers in spring, fruits in early summer.

name: Cherry
description: A deciduous tree known for its beautiful blossoms and sweet or tart fruits.
variety_info: Common types include Bing and Rainier.
attributes: Blooms in spring, fruits in late spring to summer.

name: Blueberry
description: A low-growing shrub that produces sweet, blue berries.

name: Cranberry
description: A low-growing shrub that produces tart red berries.
variety_info: Common varieties include Stevens and Big Red.
attributes: Fruits in late summer to fall.

name: Blackberry
description: A thorny shrub that produces sweet, dark berries.

name: Raspberry
description: A thorny shrub that produces sweet, red or black fruits.
variety_info: Includes Red and Black raspberry varieties.

name: Strawberry
description: A low-growing herb that produces sweet, red berries.
variety_info: Common varieties include June-bearing and Ever-bearing.
attributes: Fruits from late spring to summer.

name: Pawpaw
description: A small to medium-sized tree known for its unique, custard-like fruit.

name: Elderberry
description: A deciduous shrub known for its clusters of small white flowers and dark purple berries.

name: Mulberry
description: A fast-growing tree that produces sweet, edible berries.

name: Gooseberry
description: A thorny shrub producing small, tart berries.

name: Basil
description: A popular culinary herb known for its aromatic leaves.

name: Mint
description: A vigorous herb known for its refreshing aroma and flavor.

name: Oregano
description: A perennial herb with aromatic leaves used in cooking.

name: Thyme
description: A low-growing herb with fragrant leaves, commonly used in cooking.

name: Rosemary
description: An aromatic herb with needle-like leaves, used in cooking and medicinally.

name: Sage
description: A hardy herb with grayish-green leaves, known for its culinary uses.

name: Cilantro
description: Cilantro is a popular herb known for its fresh, citrusy flavor, often used in salsa and Asian dishes.
variety_info: Commonly grown varieties include leaf cilantro and coriander.

name: Parsley
description: Parsley is a versatile herb that is often used as a garnish or flavoring in various cuisines.
variety_info: Common varieties include flat-leaf and curly-leaf parsley.

name: Dill
description: Dill is an herb with feathery leaves and a distinct flavor, commonly used in pickling.
variety_info: Popular varieties include Mammoth and Fernleaf.

name: Chives
description: Chives are a mild onion-flavored herb, often used fresh in salads and dishes.
variety_info: Common varieties include Garlic Chives and Common Chives.

name: Tarragon
description: Tarragon is a perennial herb known for its unique flavor, commonly used in French cuisine.
variety_info: French Tarragon and Russian Tarragon are the most common varieties.

name: Marjoram
description: Marjoram is a fragrant herb with a sweet flavor, often used in Mediterranean dishes.
variety_info: Sweet Marjoram is the most commonly used variety.

name: Catnip
description: Catnip is a herb known for its stimulant effects on cats; it has a minty flavor and aroma.
variety_info: Common varieties include Common Catnip and Lemon Catnip.

name: Wild Bergamot
description: Wild Bergamot is a flowering herb known for its aromatic leaves and is popular for attracting pollinators.

name: Yarrow
description: Yarrow is a hardy herb known for its feathery leaves and clusters of small flowers, often used in herbal medicine.

name: Sunflower
description: Sunflowers are tall, bright flowers known for their large yellow blooms and ability to track the sun.
variety_info: Common varieties include Giant Sunflower and Dwarf Sunflower.

name: Black-Eyed Susan
description: A bright yellow flower with a dark center, commonly found in wildflower gardens.
variety_info: Rudbeckia hirta varieties include 'Indian Summer' and 'Toto'

name: Coneflower
description: Known for its distinctive cone-shaped center and vibrant petals, coneflowers are hardy and drought-resistant.
variety_info: Echinacea purpurea varieties include 'Magnus' and 'White Swan'

name: Goldenrod
description: A perennial plant known for its bright yellow flower clusters that bloom in late summer.

name: Aster
description: A charming flower with star-shaped blooms, perfect for late summer gardens.
variety_info: Aster novae-angliae varieties include 'Alma Potschke' and 'Purple Dome'

name: Columbine
description: A delicate flower with unique bell-shaped blooms, often found in woodland gardens.
variety_info: Aquilegia species include 'McKana's Giant' and 'Blue Barlow'

name: Lupine
description: Known for its tall spikes of colorful flowers, lupines are a favorite in cottage gardens.
variety_info: Lupinus polyphyllus varieties include 'Russell Hybrid' and 'Gallery Mix'

name: Milkweed
description: A crucial plant for monarch butterflies, milkweed features clusters of pink or orange flowers.
variety_info: Asclepias tuberosa varieties include 'Butterfly Weed' and 'Common Milkweed'

name: Marigold
description: Bright and cheerful flowers that are easy to grow and repel many garden pests.
variety_info: Tagetes species include 'French Marigold' and 'African Marigold'

name: Daisy
description: A classic flower that symbolizes purity, daisies bloom in various colors and are easy to grow.
variety_info: Bellis perennis varieties include 'Shasta Daisy' and 'Oxeye Daisy'

name: Wild Rose
description: A flowering shrub that produces fragrant blooms and is often found in natural settings.
variety_info: Rosa species include 'Rosa carolina' and 'Rosa rugosa'

name: Fireweed
description: Fireweed is a vibrant flowering plant known for its tall spikes of pink flowers.

name: Bluebell
description: Bluebells are charming bell-shaped flowers that create beautiful blue carpets in spring.
variety_info: Hyacinthoides non-scripta is a common variety.

name: Trillium
description: Trillium is a perennial flower with three-petaled blooms, often found in woodlands.
variety_info: Trillium grandiflorum is a notable variety.

name: Violet
description: Violets are small, fragrant flowers that bloom in a variety of colors.
variety_info: Viola odorata is a popular variety.

name: Iris
description: Iris features elegant blooms and comes in a variety of colors and sizes.
variety_info: Iris germanica is a common variety.

name: White Oak
description: White Oak is a large tree known for its sturdy wood and beautiful fall colors.
variety_info: Quercus alba is the scientific name.

name: Red Oak
description: Red Oak is a fast-growing tree with beautiful red foliage in the fall.
variety_info: Quercus rubra is the scientific name.

name: Sugar Maple
description: Sugar Maple is valued for its sap, which is used to make maple syrup.
variety_info: Acer saccharum is the scientific name.

name: Red Maple
description: Red Maple is known for its brilliant red fall color and adaptability to varied soils.
variety_info: Acer rubrum is the scientific name.

name: Ponderosa Pine
description: Ponderosa Pine is known for its tall stature and long needles, often found in western forests.
variety_info: Pinus ponderosa is the scientific name.

name: White Pine
description: A tall, evergreen conifer with long needles and a straight trunk, valued for its timber and aesthetic appeal.
variety_info: Eastern White Pine, Western White Pine

name: Lodgepole Pine
description: A tall, slender tree known for its straight trunk and adaptability to poor soils, often found in mountainous regions.
variety_info: Coastal Lodgepole Pine, Interior Lodgepole Pine

name: Sitka Spruce
description: A large conifer known for its straight trunk and high-quality timber, thriving in coastal regions.

name: White Spruce
description: A hardy conifer known for its attractive blue-green needles and adaptability to various soil types.

name: Douglas Fir
description: A large conifer valued for its timber and distinctive cones, often found in mountainous areas.
variety_info: Coastal Douglas Fir, Rocky Mountain Douglas Fir

name: Balsam Fir
description: An aromatic evergreen tree known for its fragrant needles and symmetrical shape, commonly used as a Christmas tree.

name: Sycamore
description: A large deciduous tree with distinctive peeling bark and broad leaves, often found near water sources.

name: Birch
description: A deciduous tree characterized by its white bark and slender branches, often found in clusters.

name: Aspen
description: A deciduous tree known for its white bark and trembling leaves, commonly found in groups.

name: Cottonwood
description: A large tree with broad leaves and fluffy seed clusters, often found near rivers and wetlands.

name: Redwood
description: A tall evergreen tree known for its height and longevity.

name: Sequoia
description: A giant tree known for its massive trunk and height.

name: Cedar
description: An aromatic evergreen tree with needle-like leaves.

name: Hemlock
description: A medium-sized tree with drooping branches and flat needles.

name: Hickory
description: A hardwood tree known for its strong wood and edible nuts.

name: Black Walnut
description: A large deciduous tree valued for its wood and nuts.

name: Cherry Tree
description: A deciduous tree known for its beautiful blossoms and fruit.

name: Apple Tree
description: A popular fruit tree known for its delicious apples.

name: Magnolia
description: A flowering tree known for its large, fragrant blooms.

name: Dogwood
description: A small tree known for its beautiful flowers and berries.

name: Juniper
description: A hardy evergreen tree with needle-like foliage.
variety_info: Common varieties include Eastern Red Cedar and Colorado Blue Juniper.

name: Rhododendron
description: A flowering shrub known for its large clusters of blooms.
variety_info: Includes Azaleas and various hybrid species.

name: Azalea
description: A popular flowering shrub that produces vibrant blooms.
variety_info: Includes both deciduous and evergreen types.

name: Mountain Laurel
description: An evergreen shrub with beautiful clusters of flowers.
variety_info: Native to the eastern United States.

name: Elderberry Shrub
description: A deciduous shrub known for its clusters of berries.
variety_info: Common types include American Elder and European Elder.

name: Blueberry Shrub
description: A fruit-bearing shrub that produces sweet, nutritious berries.

name: Manzanita
description: A drought-tolerant shrub with attractive red bark.
variety_info: Includes various species like Pacific Manzanita.

name: Sagebrush
description: A hardy, drought-resistant shrub with aromatic leaves.

name: Sumac
description: A deciduous shrub known for its bright red berries.
variety_info: Includes Smooth Sumac and Staghorn Sumac.

name: Gooseberry Shrub
description: A deciduous shrub producing tart berries.

name: Snowberry
description: A deciduous shrub known for its white berries and adaptability.

name: Agave
description: A succulent plant known for its rosette shape and sharp leaves.

name: Aloe
description: A popular succulent known for its medicinal properties and gel-filled leaves.

name: Prickly Pear Cactus
description: A cactus known for its flat pads and edible fruit called 'tunas.'

name: Saguaro Cactus
description: Iconic tall cactus known for its arms and longevity.

name: Barrel Cactus
description: A round cactus known for its ribbed body and vibrant flowers.

name: Yucca
description: A hardy plant with sword-like leaves and tall flower spikes.

name: Sedum
description: A diverse group of succulents known for their fleshy leaves and ground cover.

name: Echeveria
description: A rosette-forming succulent with vibrant colors and shapes.

name: Century Plant
description: A large succulent that blooms once in its lifetime, producing a tall flower spike.

name: Buffalo Grass
description: A hardy, drought-tolerant grass native to the Great Plains of North America.
variety_info: Commonly available in several cultivars, including 'Elite' and 'Cody'.

name: Blue Grama
description: A warm-season grass that has a distinctive blue-green color and is native to the North American plains.
attributes: Drought-resistant, low maintenance, attractive seed heads.

name: Big Bluestem
description: A tall grass known for its distinctive bluish-green color and large seed heads.

name: Little Bluestem
description: A native prairie grass that turns a striking reddish color in the fall.

name: Switchgrass
description: A tall, warm-season grass that is used for erosion control and wildlife habitat.

name: Wheat
description: A cereal grain grown for its seeds, widely used in food products.
variety_info: Includes varieties like 'Hard Red Winter' and 'Soft White'.

name: Barley
description: A cereal grain used for food, animal feed, and brewing.
common_pests: Barley yellow dwarf virus, root aphids

name: Oats
description: A cereal grain primarily used for food and animal feed, known for its high fiber content.

name: Wild Rye
description: A cool-season grass that is often used for erosion control and wildlife habitat.

name: Morel
description: A highly sought-after edible mushroom known for its distinctive honeycomb appearance.

name: Chanterelle
description: Chanterelle mushrooms are known for their golden color and delicate flavor, often found in forests.
attributes: Fruiting body with a wavy cap and gills underneath.
treatment_methods: Avoid overwatering and ensure good air circulation

name: Oyster Mushroom
description: Oyster mushrooms are popular culinary mushrooms with a mild flavor and soft texture.
attributes: Fan-shaped caps, varying in color from white to gray.

name: Hen-of-the-Woods
description: Hen-of-the-woods is a large, edible mushroom that grows at the base of trees, known for its rich flavor.
attributes: Clustered, fan-shaped caps resembling a hen's feathers.

name: Porcini
description: Porcini mushrooms are prized for their nutty flavor and meaty texture, often used in gourmet cooking.
attributes: Large, brown cap with a thick stem.

name: Lion's Mane
description: Lion's Mane mushrooms are known for their unique appearance and potential health benefits.

name: Daylily
description: Daylilies are hardy perennial flowers known for their vibrant blooms and easy care.
attributes: Flowers bloom for one day, come in various colors.

name: Hosta
description: Hostas are shade-loving perennials known for their lush foliage and beautiful flowers.
attributes: Large leaves, can vary in color from green to blue.

name: Peony
description: Peonies are perennial flowers known for their large, fragrant blooms and lush foliage.
attributes: Large blooms, often in shades of pink, white, and red.

name: Coneflower
description: Coneflowers are hardy perennials known for their vibrant, daisy-like flowers and resilience.
attributes: Distinct cone-shaped center with petal-like rays.

name: Black-Eyed Susan
description: Black-Eyed Susans are cheerful, daisy-like flowers known for their striking yellow petals and dark centers.
attributes: Bright yellow petals with a dark brown center.

name: Phlox
description: Phlox is a colorful flowering plant that thrives in various garden settings.
variety_info: Includes several varieties like Garden Phlox and Creeping Phlox.

name: Lavender
description: Lavender is a fragrant herb known for its aromatic flowers and essential oils.
variety_info: Includes English Lavender and French Lavender.

name: Marigold
description: Marigolds are vibrant flowers that add color and repel pests in the garden.
variety_info: Includes French Marigold and African Marigold.

name: Petunia
description: Petunias are popular annuals known for their colorful blooms and versatility.
variety_info: Includes Wave Petunia and Grandiflora Petunia.

name: Impatiens
description: Impatiens are shade-loving flowers that provide color in low-light areas.
variety_info: Includes New Guinea Impatiens and Bedding Impatiens.

name: Zinnia
description: Zinnias are hardy annuals that produce vibrant blooms throughout the summer.

name: Snapdragon
description: Snapdragons are unique flowers known for their dragon-shaped blooms.
variety_info: Includes Tall Mix and Dwarf Mix Snapdragons.
